regional_cost_note: Bricklayers in Whangārei typically charge $125–$190/m² for single-skin brickwork, $115–$170/m² for blockwork, and $210–$420/m² for heritage restoration. Northland rates are broadly in line with the national average, with some capacity constraints for specialist trades. Brick is less common in NZ new builds but remains popular for retaining walls, paving, and heritage restoration.
